ddls:
CREATE TABLE "adults" (
  "adult_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adult */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the adult */,
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Work class ID */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Education level ID */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Marital status ID */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Occupation ID */,
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Relationship status ID */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Race ID */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Gender ID */,
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* Native country ID */,
  "income_level_id" INTEGER /* Income level ID */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gains */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital losses */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Hours worked per week */,
  "fnlwgt" INTEGER /* Final weight, calculated by the Census Bureau */,
  "health_insurance" TEXT /* Health insurance status */,
  "disability_status" TEXT /* Disability status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adult_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adults_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adults_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adults_native_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("native_country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adults_income_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_level_id") REFERENCES income_levels ("income_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adults_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adults_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adults_marital_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status_id") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adults_workclass_id FOREIGN KEY ("workclass_id") REFERENCES work_classes ("workclass_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adults_relationship_id FOREIGN KEY ("relationship_id") REFERENCES relationships ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_classes" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work class */,
  "workclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the work class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the work class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship status */,
  "relationship_name" TEXT /* Name of the relationship status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_levels" (
  "income_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income level */,
  "income_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the income level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "adult_id" INTEGER /* ID of the adult whose data is being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_adult_id FOREIGN KEY ("adult_id") REFERENCES adults ("adult_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "economic_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of economic data */,
  "adult_id" INTEGER /* ID of the adult related to the economic data */,
  "tax_info" TEXT /* Tax information */,
  "investments" TEXT /* Investment details */,
  "other_financials" TEXT /* Other financial details */,
  "bankruptcies" INTEGER /* Number of bankruptcies */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economic_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_adult_id FOREIGN KEY ("adult_id") REFERENCES adults ("adult_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_insurance_providers" (
  "health_insurance_provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health insurance provider */,
  "health_insurance_provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the health insurance provider */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the health insurance provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_insurance_provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adult_health_insurance" (
  "adult_health_insurance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adult's health insurance */,
  "adult_id" INTEGER /* ID of the adult */,
  "health_insurance_provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health insurance provider */,
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Policy number */,
  "coverage_start_date" TEXT /* Coverage start date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adult_health_insurance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adult_health_insurance_health_insurance_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("health_insurance_provider_id") REFERENCES health_insurance_providers ("health_insurance_provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adult_health_insurance_adult_id FOREIGN KEY ("adult_id") REFERENCES adults ("adult_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disability_statuses" (
  "disability_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disability status */,
  "disability_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the disability status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disability status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disability_status_id")
)
